differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay to assess neutrophil oxidative burst activity
Conduct whole-exome or targeted gene sequencing for primary immunodeficiency syndromes (specifically CYBB mutations)
Perform a specialized histopathological review of liver and lung tissue focusing on CGD-associated features
Assess serum immunoglobulin levels and vaccine response titers to evaluate humoral immunity
Obtain infectious disease consultation for consideration of long-term targeted antimicrobial therapy vs. anti-inflammatory therapy

differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous complications
next_steps: Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to assess neutrophil oxidative burst activity
Measure serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and vaccine response titers
Conduct whole-exome sequencing or targeted genetic panel for primary immunodeficiency (CYBB, NCF1, NCF2, CYBA)
Request specialized pathology consultation for re-evaluation of liver and marrow biopsies, specifically looking for PAS-positive macrophages
Consult Immunology and Infectious Disease services for multidisciplinary management
Perform whole-body PET/CT imaging to guide potential diagnostic biopsy of the most active site
